headline: Uncover the latest developments among S&P500 stocks in today's session.
summary: Curious about the S&P500 stocks that are in motion on Monday? Join us as we explore the top movers within the S&P500 index during today's session.

headline: BIG ROCK BREWERY INC. ANNOUNCES FISCAL 2025 RESULTS WITH A $5.8 MILLION INCREASE IN ADJUSTED EBITDA
summary: Big Rock Brewery Inc. (TSX: BR) ("Big Rock" or the "Corporation") today announces its financial results for the three months and year ended December 30, 2025.

headline: 3 Profitable Stocks with Competitive Advantages
summary: Companies with solid operating margins have a competitive edge, allowing them to reinvest for sustainable expansion. The best of these businesses balance profitability with reinvestment, setting themselves up for long-term success.
